title: Primary assessment
equipment_needed: PPE, monitor if available, oxygen/airway supplies
critical_fail_points: Skipping life threats; treating before identifying ABC threats
reassessment_points: Reassess ABCs after each critical intervention
documentation_points: Document mental status, airway, breathing, circulation, interventions

title: BVM ventilation
equipment_needed: BVM, mask, oxygen, airway adjunct, suction
preparation_steps: Position airway, seal mask, attach oxygen
critical_fail_points: Overventilation, poor seal, no chest rise

title: Bleeding control
contraindications: Do not delay tourniquet for massive bleeding

title: Spinal motion restriction
indications: Trauma with high-risk features or neuro deficit
preparation_steps: Assess mechanism, neuro, pain, distracting injury

title: Radio report
preparation_steps: Organize age/sex, complaint, vitals, treatment, ETA

title: Supraglottic airway
critical_fail_points: Not confirming placement; no ventilation assessment

title: 12-lead acquisition
indications: Chest pain, dyspnea, syncope, suspected ACS

title: Medication infusion setup
critical_fail_points: Dose error, unit error, wrong concentration
